title: Develop a system to monitor and evaluate the pest management plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a system to monitor and evaluate the pest management plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine pest monitoring and evaluation requirements

pcs.text: Identify pest management plan monitoring and evaluation objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify pest management plan monitoring and evaluation objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify pest management plan monitoring and evaluation objectives.
